title: dantia palustris
intro: Dantia palustris, also known as Marsh Dandelion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Dantia palustris can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
